expectations.text: Proceeded without Gate A because audience + differentiator were supplied
expectations.evidence: The response immediately produced value proposition options without asking any gating questions, directly acting on the supplied audience (busy parents) and differentiators.

expectations.text: Produced an outcome-led, specific value proposition
expectations.evidence: Option 2 — 'We help busy parents get a real, home-cooked meal on the table every night — even the nights when there's no time to cook' — is outcome-led and specific.

expectations.text: Is differentiated enough to pass the 'only this brand could say it' test
expectations.evidence: The explanation notes that '5 minutes' and 'No ultra-processed ingredients' together differentiate from 'fast food, meal kits that cut corners, and convenience food in general,' making this brand-specific.
